allow:
Bash(.venv/bin/python3 << 'EOF'
import sqlite3
from datetime import date, timedelta
from actual import Actual
from actual.queries import get_transactions

conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/amazon_spending.sqlite3'\)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
cfg = conn.execute\('SELECT base_url, password, file FROM actual_budget_config WHERE singleton_id=1'\).fetchone\(\)

# Our amount_cents values \(already negative\)
our_cents = set\(r['amount_cents'] for r in conn.execute\(
    'SELECT amount_cents FROM retailer_transactions WHERE actual_synced_at IS NULL AND amount_cents IS NOT NULL'
\).fetchall\(\)\)

with Actual\(base_url=cfg['base_url'], password=cfg['password'], file=cfg['file']\) as actual:
    # Pull a broad window - all of 2025 and 2026
    all_txns = get_transactions\(
        actual.session,
        start_date=date\(2025, 1, 1\),
        end_date=date\(2026, 12, 31\),
    \)
    print\(f"Total Actual transactions pulled: {len\(all_txns\)}"\)

    # Check if any Actual amounts match our cents directly \(1:1 scale\)
    actual_amounts_cents = {t.amount for t in all_txns}
    direct_matches = our_cents & actual_amounts_cents
    print\(f"Direct matches \(cents == amount\): {len\(direct_matches\)}"\)
    if direct_matches:
        print\(f"  sample: {list\(direct_matches\)[:5]}"\)

    # Check if any Actual amounts match our milliunits \(×10 scale\)
    our_milliunits = {c * 10 for c in our_cents}
    milliunit_matches = our_milliunits & actual_amounts_cents
    print\(f"Milliunit matches \(cents×10 == amount\): {len\(milliunit_matches\)}"\)
    if milliunit_matches:
        print\(f"  sample: {list\(milliunit_matches\)[:5]}"\)

    # Show distribution of Actual amounts to understand their scale
    import statistics
    amounts = [abs\(t.amount\) for t in all_txns if t.amount]
    if amounts:
        print\(f"\\nActual amount stats \(absolute values\):"\)
        print\(f"  min={min\(amounts\)}  max={max\(amounts\)}  median={statistics.median\(amounts\):.0f}"\)
        print\(f"  sample raw amounts: {sorted\(amounts\)[:10]}"\)
EOF)
